positive: Minimalist vector illustration of a vibrant, stylized astronaut floating among abstract, geometric nebulae and crystalline star formations. The astronaut should have a clean, stylized suit with clear silhouettes and a sense of gentle gravity. The background nebula should feature deep indigo, electric cyan, and contrasting pops of warm gold and magenta, rendered with thick outlines and high contrast. Composition should be centered and symmetrical, emphasizing the journey and wonder. Style: Modern flat illustration, mid-century modern poster art combined with futuristic sci-fi aesthetic. Highly detailed, print-ready, vector quality, high contrast.
negative: blur, amateur, messy, ugly, watermark, text, signature, logo, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grain, jpeg artifacts, low detail
